# Rebase strategy

## Tier2 line rebase

Notes on the `tier2_line_rebase` procedure. When a tier-2 line falls behind
the trunk tip we must rewind, replay, then fast-forward. The phrase
`tier2_line_rebase` is the canonical identifier used in needles and specs.

## Cross-heading recall

If a query mentions "tier2 line rebase" we should retrieve this chunk even
though the heading text alone is "Tier2 line rebase". BM25 tokenizes across
underscores and case.
